projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: Manage projects and their configuration
projects.name: Project Name
projects.createFirst: Create your first project to get started
projects.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this project? All associated tasks and time entries will be affected.
projects.inheritWarning: This project will be automatically disabled when the client is disabled.
projects.assignmentLoadRetryHint: Retry before saving any assignment changes.
projects.dateRangeInvalid: End date must be on or after start date
projects.revenueFromActivities: Computed from the sum of activity revenues.
projects.deleteTaskConfirm: Delete this task? This action cannot be undone.

detail.detailsDescription: Edit the core configuration for this project.
detail.tasksDescription: Inline-edit tasks, expected effort and revenue.
detail.analyticsDescription: KPIs and charts derived from time entries on this project.

timeline.title: Project timeline
timeline.description: Days elapsed against the total project duration.
timeline.noDates: Set the project start and end dates above to see the timeline.

charts.hoursByUserDesc: Hours each user logged, broken down by task.
charts.hoursByTaskDesc: Logged hours against the available effort, per task.
charts.costVsRevenueDesc: Cumulative entry cost over time against the project revenue ceiling.
charts.costHiddenNote: Cumulative cost is hidden because you don't have permission to view cost data.
charts.monthlyActivityDesc: Hours logged each month — the project's pace and momentum.

empty.noEntriesDescription: Charts populate as team members track time against this project.
empty.unavailableDescription: Time-entry data couldn't be loaded — see the notice above for details.

notices.truncated: Showing the most recent {{count}} time entries — older data is not loaded.
notices.partialScope: You only see entries from users you can view; project-wide totals may be higher.
notices.forbiddenDescription: You don't have permission to view time entries, so analytics can't be displayed.
notices.loadFailedDescription: Please refresh the page or try again later.

rules.title: Project rules
rules.description: Automatic controls that watch this project and notify you when something needs attention.

budgetThreshold.name: Alert when budget exceeds threshold
budgetThreshold.description: Notify project managers when logged cost crosses 80% of the project revenue.

deadlineApproaching.name: Warn before the end date
deadlineApproaching.description: Surface a warning 7 days before the project end date if open tasks remain.

staleTask.name: Flag stale tasks
staleTask.description: Highlight tasks with no time logged in the last 14 days.

unassignedTask.name: Catch unassigned tasks
unassignedTask.description: Notify when a task is created without an assignee or with no expected effort.

tasks.title: Tasks
tasks.subtitle: Manage tasks and assignments
tasks.name: Task Name
tasks.createFirst: Create your first task to get started
tasks.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this task?
tasks.deleteConfirmDesc: Are you sure you want to delete {{name}}? This action cannot be undone.
